description: An employee was injured on the job and needs to file a workers' compensation claim.

nodes.task_description: Receive the report of the workplace injury.

expected_outcome.expected: The safety manager receives the initial injury report.

nodes.task_description: Provide the employee with the required claim forms and information on approved medical providers.

expected_outcome.expected: Manager gives the employee all necessary paperwork.

nodes.task_description: File the 'First Report of Injury' with the company's workers' compensation insurance carrier.

expected_outcome.expected: Manager successfully submits the claim to the insurance provider.
